summary: Iteration 26 - v4.2.0 Bug Fixes VERIFIED. All 13 backend tests passed. Emergency Stop now correctly blocks ALL new trades when active. CALL/PUT signal mapping fixed. Max Per Trade enforcement working. Today's P&L shows real unrealized values (not ₹0). Version v4.2.0 confirmed in footer.
critical_code_review_comments: Emergency Stop Fix VERIFIED: POST /api/emergency-stop with {active:true} correctly sets emergency_stop in settings and blocks all trade execution
Signal Generator Fix VERIFIED: trading_signal BUY_CALL maps to CALL, BUY_PUT maps to PUT, HOLD/unknown skips trade
Max Per Trade Fix VERIFIED: New trades (8e9dd30d, 81b3c059) have investments ₹17,400 and ₹10,500 - both under ₹20,000 limit
One test trade (test_trade_2) exceeds limit at ₹22,425 but this is pre-fix test data - new trades respect limit
Today's P&L Fix VERIFIED: Shows ₹16.56 unrealized P&L from open trades (not stuck at ₹0)
AI Journal blocking logic present in signal_generator.js _shouldBlockFromJournal() - blocks trades with >=5 patterns and <=20% win rate
Entry price sync from Upstox implemented in trading.js lines 77-88 - syncs entry_price from broker's average_price

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Emergency Stop, Version, P&L display all working)

seed_data_creation: 4 open paper trades exist - 2 created by signal generator (within limits), 2 test trades from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v4.2.0 bug fixes verified. Emergency Stop blocks ALL new trades when active (tested activation/deactivation/persistence). Signal generator correctly maps BUY_CALL→CALL, BUY_PUT→PUT. Max per trade enforcement working - new trades stay under ₹20K limit. Today's P&L correctly shows unrealized from open trades. Version v4.2.0 confirmed in footer.

emergency_stop_persistence.result: emergency_stop:true visible in settings when active

emergency_stop_blocks_trades.test: News fetch does NOT generate trades when emergency stop active

max_per_trade_enforcement.verification: New trades at ₹17,400 and ₹10,500 - both under limit

ai_journal_blocking.logic: Blocks if >=5 patterns AND <=20% win rate

entry_price_sync.logic: Syncs entry_price from Upstox average_price on /api/trades/active

today_pnl_calculation.note: P&L updates in real-time from open trade simulations
